acceptance.assertion: At least three comparable task pairs or a justified smaller minimum are recorded under the defined conditions with task class, diff size and evidence boundaries.
Each run is scored for localization, evidence completeness, patch scope, check fit, miss taxonomy, false-confidence risk and effort overhead.
Run evidence includes external observations such as existing tests, CI, review/operator notes or patch-evaluation artifacts; agent-authored tests alone are never treated as proof.
The final decision is explicit: promote, pilot, defer or drop each candidate condition, with non-claims preserved.

goal: Run comparable agent code-work tasks through the RepoBrief Workbench usefulness evaluation matrix and produce a measured promotion/defer/drop decision without self-proof or default-promotion shortcuts.

metadata.reason: RPU-V1-T012 implemented the measurement harness but intentionally did not execute comparable runs or prove usefulness.
metadata.selection_reason: After resource implementation, the next useful validation is to run a RepoBrief workbench usefulness series against real agent-facing surfaces.
metadata.unblocked_by: RPU-V1-T020 verified via Lenskit PR #940; RPU-V1-T012 dependency already verified.

validated_acceptance.decision-recorded: decision.yml is schema-compliant with verdict=insufficient_proof and pilot_decision=pilot_without_promotion; result.md preserves the no-default-promotion and no-condition-superiority non-claims.
validated_acceptance.generated-artifacts-current: docs/_generated/promotion-readiness.json and docs/_generated/doc-index.md were regenerated and committed after local/CI generated-artifact checks.
validated_acceptance.run-series-recorded: experiments/2026-07-09_repobrief-workbench-usefulness-eval/results/run-series.yml records three audited single-run slices across context_pack and trace_gated conditions.
validated_acceptance.validator-frontdoor: scripts/docmeta/validate_repobrief_workbench_run_series.py and its tests are wired into Makefile validate, so the run-series evidence is checked by the repository frontdoor.

validation.ci: GitHub PR #301 checks completed SUCCESS: validate, validate-doc-freshness-registry, bundle-freshness-receipt, non-blocking-diagnostics, ephemeral-diagnostics.
fixes: Changed decision.yml verdict from pilot_without_promotion to schema-compliant insufficient_proof and preserved pilot_without_promotion as pilot_decision.
Added RepoBrief Workbench run-series validator and regression tests to Makefile validate.
Committed regenerated docs/_generated/doc-index.md after the blocking generated-artifact CI contract reported stale status draft -> inconclusive.
validation.local_tests: python3 scripts/docmeta/test_validate_repobrief_workbench_run_series.py; python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_repobrief_workbench_run_series.py; python3 scripts/docmeta/validate_repobrief_workbench_usefulness.py; make validate all passed on final head.
non_claims: No default promotion of RepoBrief Workbench conditions.
No condition superiority claim from the limited series.
No proof of agent quality, runtime correctness, or production safety.
The run series is comparative evidence for pilot/defer decisions, not a broad statistical study.
validation.vibe_lab_pr: heimgewebe/vibe-lab#301 merged via squash at fc5dc95d6a267fce085accb84e486b7feed9cfdd with final head 0fd95f9a2c06ff81ed06a7affb50240d3d0658db.

metadata.verification_note: RepoBrief Workbench usefulness run series was recorded, validated, CI-green and merged. Decision remains conservative: pilot without default promotion, no condition superiority claim.

title: Execute RepoBrief workbench usefulness run series
